polymarket.limit_proof: Public REST API, no documented rate limits or API key required

hyperliquid.limit_proof: Public info API, no rate limits documented for read-only endpoints

asterdex.limit_proof: Public DEX API, no auth or rate limits documented

sabre.limit_proof: Cert environment free for development, no documented call limits

amadeus.limit_proof: Self-Service free tier: 2,000 Flight Search calls/month, varies by endpoint

foursquare.limit_proof: Developer plan: no hard monthly cap documented, rate-limited per second

tmdb.limit_proof: Free API, rate limit ~50 requests/second, no daily/monthly cap

health.limit_proof: USDA FoodData Central: 1,000 requests/hour with API key (aggregated as daily)

finance.limit_proof: Open-source CDN-hosted data, ECB/Frankfurter public, FRED free key, World Bank open, OpenIBAN free

music.limit_proof: MusicBrainz: 1 req/sec with User-Agent, no daily cap. ListenBrainz + RadioBrowser also unlimited.

jobs.limit_proof: BLS registered tier: 500 requests/day. ESCO/CareerJet unlimited.

education.limit_proof: OpenAlex: 10 req/sec polite pool, no daily cap. PubMed/arXiv/CrossRef also free unlimited.

aviasales.limit_proof: Flight Data API: 200 req/hour per IP, free for partners

aipush.limit_proof: Internal service-to-service on same server, no rate limits

whoisxml.limit_proof: 500 free DRS credits on signup, lifetime (not time-reset), then paid plans

whoisjson.limit_proof: Basic plan: 1,000 req/month free, 20 req/min, all endpoints included, expires May 2026

congress.limit_proof: Library of Congress open data. Free API key, 5,000 req/hour. All US legislation since 1973.

gbif.limit_proof: CC0/CC BY open data. No auth, no rate limits. 2.5B+ occurrences, 9M+ taxa. Intergovernmental organization.

pypi.limit_proof: Public API, no auth, no documented rate limits. PSF operated. 550K+ Python packages.

fema.limit_proof: US Government open data. No auth, no rate limits. All disasters since 1953.

sam.limit_proof: Personal account: 10K req/day. API key expires every 90 days. US Gov open data, non-federal commercial access OK.

spending.limit_proof: US Government open data (DATA Act). No auth, no rate limits. 60M+ awards, $10+ trillion tracked.

census.limit_proof: US Government open data. Free API key required. Unlimited requests with key.

osv.limit_proof: Apache 2.0, no auth, no rate limits per FAQ. Google Open Source Security project.

npm.limit_proof: Public API, no auth, no documented rate limits. 2.1M+ packages, CDN-backed.

spoonacular.limit_proof: Free plan: 150 points/day (most endpoints cost 1 point)

jpl.limit_proof: US Government open data, no auth required, no documented rate limits

rawg.limit_proof: Free tier: unlimited requests, API key required but no cap documented

igdb.limit_proof: 4 requests/second, unlimited daily/monthly with Twitch OAuth2

qrserver.limit_proof: Fully free, open access, no auth or rate limits documented

ipapi.limit_proof: Free tier: 1,000 requests/day without API key

usgs-earthquake.limit_proof: US Government open data, no auth required, no rate limits documented

jikan.limit_proof: Rate limit: 3 req/sec, 60 req/min. No daily or monthly cap documented.

openlibrary.limit_proof: CC0 public domain, no auth required, no rate limits documented

zerobounce.limit_proof: 100 free credits/month, then $39/2,000 credits (no expiry on purchased)

apisports.limit_proof: Free plan: 100 requests/day per sport API, 10 req/min rate limit

twilio.limit_proof: Trial: $15.50 credit. SMS: $0.0083/msg US. Lookup: $0.005/call. No monthly reset.

stability.limit_proof: 25 free credits on signup, then PAYG $0.01/credit. Core: 3 credits/image.

mastodon.limit_proof: Open source AGPL, no auth for trending endpoints, 300 req/5min with auth

regulations.limit_proof: DEMO_KEY: 1,000 requests/hour. US government public domain data.

fedregister.limit_proof: No auth required, no documented rate limits. US government public domain.

courtlistener.limit_proof: 5,000 requests/hour for authenticated users. Open data, 501(c)(3) nonprofit.

ocrspace.limit_proof: Free OCR API: 25,000 requests/month, commercial use permitted

finnhub.limit_proof: Free tier: 60 API calls/minute (no daily cap), all endpoints included

newsdata.limit_proof: Free plan: 200 API credits/day, commercial use permitted on all plans

exa.limit_proof: Free tier: 1,000 requests/month, no credit card required

tavily.limit_proof: Free tier: 1,000 API credits/month, no credit card required

serper.limit_proof: 2,500 free one-time queries (6-month validity), then PAYG $1/1K queries

apiflash.limit_proof: Free plan: 100 screenshots/month, no credit card required

timeapi.limit_proof: Free, no auth required, no documented rate limits

gdelt.limit_proof: 100% free and open. No auth, no documented rate limits.

firms.limit_proof: 5,000 transactions per 10-minute interval. NASA open data.

nws.limit_proof: US Government open data, no auth, no rate limits (fair use: 1 req/30s)

noaa.limit_proof: US Government open data, no auth, no rate limits. Each tool call makes 2-3 upstream requests (points + forecast/observation).

nagerdate.limit_proof: Free, no auth, open source, no documented rate limits

sslchecker.limit_proof: Free, no auth, no documented rate limits

exchangerate.limit_proof: Free plan: 1,500 requests/month, daily updates, no credit card

shortio.limit_proof: Free plan: 1,000 branded links/month, custom domain included

nhtsa.limit_proof: US Government open data, no auth, no documented limits

restcountries.limit_proof: Fully free, no auth, open source (MPL 2.0)

openfoodfacts.limit_proof: Fully free, no auth, open data (ODbL), 3M+ products

randomuser.limit_proof: Fully free, no auth, open source, unlimited

walkscore.limit_proof: 5,000 calls/day free, Walk+Transit+Bike scores for US/Canada

usrealestate.limit_proof: 500K req/month free BASIC plan via RapidAPI

browserbase.limit_proof: Hobby plan: 100 sessions/month free, no CC required

telegram.limit_proof: Unlimited free, 30 msg/sec per chat, 900M+ Telegram users

clinicaltrials.limit_proof: US Government NLM, fully open, no auth, 577K+ clinical studies

namesilo.limit_proof: Pre-funded balance, $20 current. Auto-replenish enabled via Visa. Domain costs: .com $17.29/yr

cloudflare.limit_proof: Free plan unlimited API, 1200 req/5min rate limit, 330+ global PoPs

vatcomply.limit_proof: Free, open source (MIT), no auth, no limits, 2 req/sec rate limit

assemblyai.limit_proof: $50 free credits (185hr batch / 333hr streaming), then $0.15/hr PAYG

gleif.limit_proof: CC0 open data, no auth, no limits, G20/FSB-backed international registry

companieshouse.limit_proof: UK Government free API, 600 req/5min rate limit

edgar.limit_proof: US Government open data, no auth, 10 req/sec rate limit

bluesky.limit_proof: Free, 3000 req/5min per IP, no cost, AT Protocol open standard

artic.limit_proof: Fully free, no auth, open access, no documented rate limits

europeana.limit_proof: EU-funded, permanently free for all read APIs, no volume cap

convertapi.limit_proof: 250 free trial conversions, credit top-up PAYG, 15+ years in service

podcastindex.limit_proof: Fully free, open-source, community-maintained, no usage limits (fair use)

geocodio.limit_proof: 2,500 free lookups/day, $0.001/lookup above free tier, no CC required

autodev.limit_proof: Starter plan: 1,000 free API calls/month, 5 req/sec, usage-based data fees after

hunter.limit_proof: Free plan: 50 credits/month, domain-search costs 1 credit per call

fatsecret.limit_proof: Basic plan: 5,000 API calls per day, OAuth 2.0 client credentials

iqair.limit_proof: Community plan: 10,000 calls/month, real-time AQI + weather

ibanapi.limit_proof: 100 basic + 20 bank credits per 30 days free

currents.limit_proof: Free plan: 20 requests/day, paid plans from $9/mo (300/day)

twitterapi.limit_proof: 10,000 bonus credits on signup ($0.15/1K tweets), pay-as-you-go

rateapi.limit_proof: Free tier: 50 requests/month, MCP-native API for AI agents

gdacs.limit_proof: UN/EC open data, no auth required, no documented rate limits

who.limit_proof: UN/WHO open data, no auth required, Azure CDN-backed, no documented rate limits

disease.limit_proof: MIT open-source, no auth required, no documented rate limits

fdic.limit_proof: US Government open data, no auth required, no documented rate limits

pubchem.limit_proof: US Government open data (NIH/NLM). No auth required. Recommend ≤5 req/sec without key, 10 req/sec with NCBI API key.

openchargemap.limit_proof: Open data project, CC license, unlimited with free API key registration

ipqs.limit_proof: Free plan: 1,000 lookups/month (35/day), shared across all endpoints

cactus.limit_proof: US Government (NIH/NCI) open data, no auth, no documented rate limits

dhl.limit_proof: Production Europe: 250 requests/day. Official DHL Unified Tracking API.

postcodes-io.limit_proof: Free, open source, no auth, unlimited. Backed by ONS/Ordnance Survey UK data.

shipengine.limit_proof: Free plan: $0/mo, sandbox + discounted rates. Rate shopping and address validation unlimited. Pay only for labels.

weatherapi.limit_proof: Business trial: 10M calls/month till 2026-04-13. Commercial use OK. 100K+ global stations.

judge0.limit_proof: Free public instance, no auth, no documented rate limits (fair use). 71 programming languages.

zyte.limit_proof: Trial: $5 free credit (30 days). PAYG: $0.00013–$0.01608/request. No subscription required.

marketcheck.limit_proof: Free plan: 500 calls/month, 5 calls/sec, 100mi radius restriction. No CC required

threatintel.limit_proof: One-time trial: 100 free credits. Pay-per-credit top-up, no subscription. WhoisXML Group product

listennotes.limit_proof: Free plan: 50 requests/month. Pro: $200/mo + $1.60/1K calls. X-ListenAPI-Key header auth

audd.limit_proof: Trial: 300 free requests, no CC. Paid: $5/1K ($0.005/call). Trial active till 2026-04-11

materials-project.limit_proof: Free unlimited with API key. Rate limits: 25/sec, 1K/min, 40K/hr, 640K/day. DOE/LBNL, CC BY 4.0

17track.limit_proof: Free plan: 200 quota units/month for /register; /gettrackinfo and /gettracklist are free after registration

nhtsa-safety.limit_proof: US Government open data, no auth required, no documented rate limits

rcsb.limit_proof: CC0 public domain, US government funded, no auth required, no documented rate limits

zippopotamus.limit_proof: Free, no auth, unlimited. 60+ countries, open source.

balldontlie.limit_proof: Free: $0/sport, 5 req/min. NBA + NFL + more. No credit card required.

adzuna.limit_proof: Trial Access: ~250 req/day free. 16+ countries. Job search + salary data.

github-api.limit_proof: Authenticated: 5,000 req/hour. Read-only public data. PAT with public_repo + read:user scopes.

cocktaildb.limit_proof: Free unlimited API. Test key '1' for development. 10,000+ cocktail recipes.

imgflip.limit_proof: Free unlimited API. get_memes no auth. caption_image needs free account.

spider.limit_proof: 2,500 free credits on signup (one-time, no expiry). PAYG: ~$0.0005/scrape. No subscription required.

canopy.limit_proof: Hobby plan: 100 req/month free forever. PAYG: $0.01/req. 12 Amazon marketplaces.

remotive.limit_proof: Free public API, no auth, no documented rate limits. Curated remote-only job board.

reed.limit_proof: Jobseeker API is free read-only. No documented rate limits. Recruiter API (paid) is separate.

arbeitnow.limit_proof: Free public API, no auth, no documented rate limits. Terms: do not abuse.

jooble.limit_proof: 500 requests default limit (contact support to increase). Free API, key in URL path.

theirstack.limit_proof: 200 API credits/month free. Bearer JWT auth. 181M+ job postings, tech stack analysis.

wikidata.limit_proof: CC-0 public domain. 100M+ entities. No auth, no rate limits. Requires User-Agent header.

dictionary.limit_proof: Free unlimited. No auth. Free Dictionary API + Datamuse combined.
